meaning: adj.纤维性的,纤维状的n.[医]纤维瘤
examples: I removed the fibroid tumours, using the techniques that I have perfected.
It is a rare complication of fibroid disease.
Pyomyoma is thought to result from bacterial seeding of a necrotic fibroid.
The scientists will now begin work to look at exactly how the gene defect affects fibroid growth.
For example, some studies have shown that 80 percent of all black women suffer from some form of fibroid disease.
